hypothesis: In multi-step reaction networks containing intermediate metastable states, applying ASTRA sequentially via pairwise Score-Based Interpolation and Score-Aligned Ascent between each adjacent metastable pair will discover the corresponding elementary transition states (first-order saddle points) for each step, producing sampled ensembles whose committor distributions are centered near 0.5 despite the diffusion model being trained only on metastable-state configurations.
